reason: The published artifact is POM-only and Maven Central provides no JAR with JVM class files; Native Image metadata should target the class-bearing AWS SDK Java modules managed by the BOM.
replacement: Use a class-bearing AWS SDK Java module managed by the BOM, such as software.amazon.awssdk:aws-core:2.44.11 or a service client like software.amazon.awssdk:s3:2.44.11.
